name: omarchy_tuis
content:
TUIs 
OpenCode 
OpenCode is an AI agent harness, ike Caude Code or Gemini CLI, that works with a the
commercia and open-weight modes. Best way to use it is via the c  aias, which you
invoke once you're inside the directory you want to work on with AI.
Lazygit 
Lazygit is a deightfu aternative to something ike the GitHub Desktop appication, and it
runs inside the termina.
You can run it directy, by going to any directory managed by git and running lazygit . Or
you can run it inside Neovim where it can be started with Space G G .
You hop between the different panes using Tab . In the Fies pane, you seect fies for
staging using Space , and then you can create a new commit using c . You can see a the
commands avaiabe using ? .
Lazydocker 
Lazydocker is made in the same spirit ike Lazygit, and aso gives you a termina interface
for managing your containers and images.
You can start it with Super + Shift + D.
You stop a container using s  or start/restart it using r . See a commands using ? .
Btop 
Btop is a beautifu resource manager that shows memory, CPU, disk, and network usage.
It aso ists a active processes, and aows you to manage them.
Omarchy has added an app for it caed Activity, which you can start from the appication
auncher. But it's quicker to just hit Super + Shift + T.
Impaa 
Impaa is a TUI for managing your Wi-Fi connection. You hop between sections on tab,
then seect a network with space. If a password is needed, just input and hit return. It's
avaiabe by cicking the Wi-Fi icon in the top menu bar.
BueTUI 
BueTUI is a TUI for managing your Buetooth connections. It's made by the same creator
as Impaa and works the same way.
TUIs · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/59/tuis

Fastfetch 
Fastfetch shows system information, ike kerne version, uptime, theme, CPU, memory,
and more. It's a successor to the popuar neofetch too.
Omarchy has packaged this as About in the Omarchy menu (Super + Alt + Space).
